passport.name: Passport
passport.description: Indian Passport issued by the Ministry of External Affairs
documents: Birth Certificate or Class 10 Marksheet (DOB proof)
Address Proof (Aadhaar / Voter ID / Electricity bill)
steps: Register on Passport Seva Portal (passportindia.gov.in)
Fill Online Application Form (Form 1)
Pay application fee online
Book appointment at nearest Passport Seva Kendra (PSK)
Visit PSK with original documents on appointment date
Biometric data capture and police verification initiated
Passport dispatched via Speed Post

driving_license.name: Driving License
driving_license.description: Driving License issued by Regional Transport Office (RTO)
documents: Age Proof: Aadhaar / Birth Certificate / Class 10 Marksheet
Address Proof: Aadhaar / Voter ID / Electricity Bill
steps: Apply online at Parivahan Sewa portal (parivahan.gov.in)
Fill Form 2 for Learner's License
Pay fee and book slot for LL test
Pass online traffic knowledge test at RTO
After 30 days, apply for Permanent DL
Book driving test slot at RTO
Pass driving test — DL issued within 7 days
driving_license.timeline: Learner's License: Same day | Permanent DL: 7–15 days after test

pan_card.name: PAN Card
pan_card.description: Permanent Account Number issued by Income Tax Department
documents: Identity Proof: Aadhaar / Voter ID / Passport
Address Proof: Aadhaar / Bank Statement / Electricity Bill
Date of Birth Proof: Aadhaar / Birth Certificate
steps: Visit NSDL (onlineservices.nsdl.com) or UTIITSL (utiitsl.com)
Select 'Apply for new PAN' (Form 49A)
Fill in personal details and upload documents
Pay application fee online
Submit application and note acknowledgement number
PAN Card dispatched by post within 15 working days
pan_card.timeline: 15 working days (Physical) | Instant e-PAN via Aadhaar (few minutes)

birth_certificate.name: Birth Certificate
birth_certificate.description: Birth Certificate issued by Municipal Corporation / Gram Panchayat
documents: Filled Birth Registration Form (from local office)
steps: Report birth at hospital (most hospitals register within 21 days)
If not registered: Visit local Municipal office / Gram Panchayat
Submit birth registration form with supporting documents
Pay nominal fee
Certificate issued within 7 working days
Can also apply online at CRS portal (crsorgi.gov.in)
birth_certificate.timeline: 21 days (free), Late registration: 30–90 days (with late fee)

income_certificate.name: Income Certificate
income_certificate.description: Certificate issued by Tehsildar / Revenue Department verifying annual income
steps: Visit nearest Common Service Centre (CSC) or Tehsildar office
Fill income certificate application form
Submit documents and pay fee
Verification conducted by Revenue Inspector
Certificate issued by Tehsildar within 15–30 days
Many states offer online application via e-District portals

voter_id.name: Voter ID Card (EPIC)
voter_id.description: Elector's Photo Identity Card issued by Election Commission of India
documents: Age Proof (18+ years): Aadhaar / Birth Certificate
Address Proof: Aadhaar / Electricity Bill / Bank Passbook
steps: Visit voterportal.eci.gov.in or Voter Helpline App
Click 'New Registration' and fill Form 6
Upload documents and photograph
Submit online — no physical visit required
ERO verifies details within 30 days
Voter ID dispatched or downloadable as e-EPIC

ration_card.name: Ration Card
ration_card.description: Ration Card issued by Food & Civil Supplies Department for subsidized food grains
documents: Passport-size photographs of all family members
steps: Visit nearest Food & Civil Supplies office or CSC
Fill ration card application form
Submit documents and pay nominal fee
Field verification by inspector
Ration card issued within 30 days
Online application available in most states via state food portal

caste_certificate.name: Caste Certificate (SC/ST/OBC)
caste_certificate.description: Certificate issued by Tehsildar verifying Scheduled Caste, Scheduled Tribe, or OBC status
steps: Visit CSC or Tehsildar office with documents
Fill caste certificate application form
Verification by Revenue Inspector
Approved by Tehsildar
Certificate issued within 15–30 days
Apply via state e-District portal where available
